vocab.meaning: trạng thái thể lực đỉnh cao
vocab.example: I engage in high-intensity interval training primarily to maintain peak physical condition.
There is nothing quite like the surge of adrenaline you feel when sprinting toward the finish line.

vocab.meaning: sự phối hợp giữa tay và mắt
vocab.example: Tennis is a fantastic sport for sharpening your hand-eye coordination and reflexes.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động theo đuổi nhằm mục đích giải trí
vocab.example: Hiking has become my favorite recreational pursuit, allowing me to escape the city's hustle and bustle.

vocab.meaning: nhạy bén về mặt chiến thuật
vocab.example: Basketball isn't just about height; it requires significant tactical acumen to outsmart the opposing defense.

vocab.meaning: lối sống ít vận động/thụ động
vocab.example: Playing casual football on weekends is my primary way to combat an otherwise sedentary lifestyle.
Pilates is deceptively difficult, as it focuses heavily on building core strength and stability.

vocab.meaning: năng lực/sự tinh thông trong thể thao
vocab.example: While I lack professional sporting prowess, I thoroughly enjoy the social aspect of amateur leagues.

vocab.meaning: sức khỏe tinh thần/sự bình an trong tâm trí
vocab.example: I’ve found that long-distance running is indispensable for my mental wellbeing and stress management.

vocab.meaning: máu ăn thua/tính cách thích cạnh tranh
vocab.example: Playing competitive sports really brings out my competitive streak, even in a friendly match.
